handles: creating → normalise phone to E.164 (via PhoneNumberCast) + populate phone_country_code
creating → refuse duplicate (tenant_id, phone) via unique index
created → fire SmsOptedOut with source based on reason
deleting (soft) → refuse when reason=stop_keyword unless super_admin + re-consent evidence in metadata
deleting (soft) → refuse when is_system=true unless super_admin
